mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, token_hash AS tokenHash, token_family_id AS tokenFamilyId, expired_at AS expiredAt, revoked, device_id AS deviceId, device_type AS deviceType, device_name AS deviceName FROM refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = true, revoked_at = NOW(), last_used_at = NOW(), revoked_reason = #{reason} WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked = false
UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = true, revoked_at = NOW(), revoked_reason = #{reason} WHERE token_family_id = #{familyId} AND revoked = false
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM refresh_token WHERE expired_at < NOW() OR (revoked = true AND revoked_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY))
